surface.title: Home
surface.headline: A clean starting point for your product.
surface.lead: This demo shows how a framework implementer can introduce the application without exposing administrative screens, runtime internals or configuration data.

home.title: Home
home.body: A compact institutional entry that explains the purpose of the application and guides visitors toward public demos.
home.label: Stay here

landing.title: Landing
landing.body: A promotional page pattern for campaigns, launches, conversion flows and product storytelling.
landing.label: Open landing

store.title: Store
store.body: A storefront pattern with catalog cards, categories and a checkout summary ready to be adapted.
store.label: Open store

discover.title: Discover
discover.body: Start with public pages that help a visitor understand the product before authentication.

adapt.title: Adapt
adapt.body: Replace the demo content with the implementer brand, services and audience-specific copy.

launch.title: Launch
launch.body: Keep public pages isolated from administration while preserving the configured Catalyst theme.

surface.note: This page intentionally contains no administrative links, no module diagnostics and no configuration summary.
